summary: Published FastAPI TestClient API proof hangs in clean audit environment, while live uvicorn HTTP works.

reproduction.testclient_command: timeout 20s python3 -u -c "from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from registry import app as appmod; print('before TestClient'); client=TestClient(appmod.app); print('after TestClient'); resp=client.get('/health'); print('after response', resp.status_code, resp.text)"
reproduction.pytest_stage_reached: collection complete, fixture setup complete, test body entered
